archetypes.name: Lawman
archetypes.description: Sheriffs, marshals, and deputies keeping order on the frontier.

neutral: State your business, stranger.
Keep your hands where I can see them.
Welcome to town. Behave yourself.
friendly: Good to see you, partner.
Always glad to see a law-abiding citizen.
You're welcome in my town any time.
hostile: You've got some nerve showing your face here.
I'd arrest you right now if I had the proof.
Turn around and ride out. Now.

archetypes.name: Outlaw
archetypes.description: Bandits, rustlers, and desperados living outside the law.

neutral: Don't know you. Don't want to.
You lost, friend?
Mind your own business.
friendly: Heard about what you did. Impressive.
Pull up a seat, you're one of us now.
Need a job? I might have something.
hostile: You're a dead man walking.
The boys have been looking for you.
Should've stayed away.

archetypes.name: Merchant
archetypes.description: Shopkeepers and traders selling goods to frontier folk.

neutral: Welcome! Have a look around.
Best prices in town, I guarantee it.
What can I get for you today?
friendly: My favorite customer! I set aside something special.
I'll give you the good price, friend.
Come in, come in! Always good to see you.
hostile: We don't serve your kind here.
I've got nothing for you. Get out.
Shop's closed. For you, permanently.

archetypes.name: Rancher
archetypes.description: Cattle ranchers and farmhands working the open range.

neutral: Howdy, stranger. Just passing through?
Watch where you step. That's cattle country.
Name's on the gate. What do you want?
friendly: Good to see you, neighbor.
Stay for supper? The missus is cooking.
Need a hand with anything? You've earned it.
hostile: Get off my land before I put lead in you.
I know what you did. Stay away from my cattle.
Rustler! I'll string you up myself!

archetypes.name: Miner
archetypes.description: Prospectors and mine workers digging for gold and copper.

neutral: Can't talk long. Break's almost over.
You here about work? Talk to the foreman.
Watch your head down there.
friendly: Hey, it's you! Grab a pick and join us.
Found a vein today. Drinks are on me!
Union meeting tonight. You should come.
hostile: Company stooge. Get lost.
Claim jumper! Boys, we got trouble!
You ain't welcome in this mine.

archetypes.name: Bartender
archetypes.description: Saloon keepers who serve drinks and trade in rumors.

neutral: What'll it be?
Belly up to the bar, stranger.
We got whiskey, beer, and water. Choose wisely.
friendly: The usual? Coming right up.
There's a rumor going around you might want to hear.
First one's on the house, friend.
hostile: You're not welcome here. Door's that way.
I've got a shotgun under this bar. Test me.
Drink somewhere else.

archetypes.name: Doctor
archetypes.description: Frontier physicians treating everything from gunshots to snakebites.

neutral: What ails you?
Sit down. Let me take a look.
I hope you're here for supplies, not stitches.
friendly: You look well! A rare sight around here.
I have fresh medicine in stock. Your timing is good.
How can I help my favorite patient?
hostile: I took an oath to do no harm. Don't test it.
I'll treat your wounds. But then you leave.
Even outlaws need a doctor. Sit down.

archetypes.name: Blacksmith
archetypes.description: Smiths and gunsmiths who forge, repair, and maintain equipment.

neutral: Need something fixed? Or something new?
Steel and iron, that's my trade.
Come on in. Mind the sparks.
friendly: I sharpened something special for you.
Best work I've done in years. Take a look.
Got a custom order ready. You'll like it.
hostile: I don't shoe horses for your kind.
No service for troublemakers. Move along.
My hammer works on more than iron. Remember that.

archetypes.name: Preacher
archetypes.description: Men and women of faith offering spiritual guidance on the frontier.

neutral: Welcome, my child. All are equal in God's house.
The Lord watches over even these wild lands.
Seeking redemption? You've come to the right place.
friendly: Bless you for your good works.
The town speaks well of you. As do I.
Your deeds bring light to this dark corner of the world.
hostile: Even I have limits of forgiveness.
I'll pray for your soul. You'll need it.
Repent your sins, or answer to a higher power.

archetypes.name: Banker
archetypes.description: Financial officers managing the frontier's wealth and loans.

neutral: Deposits or withdrawals?
Interest rates are posted on the board.
We handle gold, silver, and company scrip.
friendly: Your account is doing well. Shall we discuss investments?
I have a private proposition for someone of your standing.
Always a pleasure doing business with you.
hostile: Your credit is no good here.
I've frozen your accounts pending investigation.
Security! Remove this person at once.
